hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$f" in */plugins/code-review/bin/*) echo "prebuilt binary: regenerate via (cd plugins/code-review/tools/code-review-helper && make release)" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$f" in */.claude-plugin/plugin.json) jq -e . "$f" >/dev/null && jq -e '.name and .version' "$f" >/dev/null || { echo "invalid plugin.json: missing parse, .name, or .version: $f" >&2; exit 1; } ;; */.claude-plugin/marketplace.json) jq -e . "$f" >/dev/null && jq -e '.name and .plugins' "$f" >/dev/null || { echo "invalid marketplace.json: missing parse, .name, or .plugins: $f" >&2; exit 1; } ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$f" in */plugins/*/commands/*.md) head -1 "$f" | grep -q '^---$' || { echo "$f: command frontmatter must start with ---" >&2; exit 1; }; awk 'NR==1{next} /^---[[:space:]]*$/{exit} 1' "$f" | grep -q '^description:' || { echo "$f: command frontmatter missing description field" >&2; exit 1; } ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$f" in */plugins/code-review/tools/code-review-helper/*.go) (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/plugins/code-review/tools/code-review-helper" && go vet ./...) >&2 || exit 1 ;; esac
